summary:
VISION AND PROPHETIC ACCURACY: Brandon discusses a recent vision concerning an Asian man acting like a pope and trying to cause a revival in the Philippines and surrounding islands. Brandon notes that this vision contradicted an earlier experience where he saw a white man with a jawbone alongside a man in black during the abomination of desolation. Brandon emphasizes his dedication to accuracy in his visions, questioning whether the event involving the Asian man was a future possibility that was averted through prayer or something else entirely. He contrasts his approach with other individuals who incorrectly predicted the outcome of the 2020 election but stubbornly stood by their claims.

ROLE OF THE WATCHMAN VERSUS THE PROPHET: Brandon explains a detailed revelation regarding the difference between a watchman and a prophet. Brandon states that while both roles are based on prayer and involve seeing into the future, they function differently, akin to a right eye and a left eye. A prophet acts like a firm pillar, decreeing events that are set in stone. In contrast, a watchman sees impending events on the horizon specifically so that they can be altered or averted through prayer. Brandon points out that the lack of teaching on these spiritual gifts causes confusion in the church, leading many to incorrectly label him as a prophet when his true calling is to be a watchman and an intercessor for the nations. Brandon also notes his future calling as a healing evangelist and mentions Kim Clement as an example of a true prophet.

PUBLIC PERCEPTION AND CRITICS: Brandon acknowledges that there are content creators who make money by criticizing and mocking his visions. Brandon states that he provides these critics with material and a source of income, maintaining a stance of not bowing down to the persecution. Brandon also mentions a personal effort to lose weight, noting a recent fifteen-pound weight loss, and explains his choice to wear plain black t-shirts. Brandon makes these physical adjustments to ensure his appearance and clothing do not distract the audience from the core message of his visions. Brandon briefly references a past vision regarding an incident with Trump's ear that he initially shared on Steve Cioccolanti's channel, highlighting how that specific word significantly increased his visibility.

UPCOMING WEATHER EVENTS: Brandon shares a vision concerning severe weather approaching the central United States. Brandon specifies seeing two major tornadoes, larger than an EF3 classification, striking near the border of Nebraska and Kansas, specifically mentioning the Omaha area. Brandon explains that this foreknowledge is provided so that believers can actively pray against the destructive weather and form a protective hedge over homes, businesses, and lives in the affected regions.
rawData: [May 10, 2025]-[I stand by what I say]-[https://youtu.be/iAY5u-4enWM]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord, or afternoon like it is here. I had a video that I made you all about the pope and my response to it, or all the things that I believe I've seen. But I've recorded that video, I think, four times now. Every single time I get finished with the video, I feel that it's not finished what I'm supposed to say. I told Braden, "I want to get it right smack dab on because it's that important to me to be accurate in the prophetic, as a watchman." The prayer time that I had in this last video was amazing. I encourage you to listen to the whole thing. What the Holy Spirit said shook me. It was amazing, and I want to tell you all it's that clear what the Holy Spirit said in the prayer time. This is what I have to say about it, and I've gone over this. Even Braden and I have been talking. Diana had to go get groceries and stuff. What I saw is what I saw. What I saw was the Asian man. I do not give any excuses for that. It was out of my prayer time with you all. I relayed exactly what I was shown. Was it off? Yes. Could it be imagination? I took communion, y'all. I did exactly what I always do: I go in with authority and I sit at his feet just like I always do. What I think is interesting is when I spoke against the prophetic people just this last week who missed it about Trump in the first term. But they stood by what they said. They stood by what they saw because they believed they were shown it and they fought for it. But it was still not accurate for that time frame. Everything that they were shown, everybody stood by it to the point of embarrassment. But they believed it because they knew what they seen in the spirit, but it was off. This what I saw about the Asian pope contradicted what I saw in tribulation. And that's why it was so hard for me when I grabbed my head and I said, "I bind any demonic spirits trying to influence this vision right now in the name of Jesus." I came against it instantaneously because I saw the white man that had the jawbone and all the things that I've always said at the abomination of desolation whenever the pope was standing there with the man in black. I saw that, and I know that was an out-of-body experience that I had with the Lord Jesus. I saw the drones. I saw all of it. That was more real to me than just pinching myself right now. I could smell the blood. I could smell everything. Feel the fires, all of it. It was just real. But this was a prayer assignment praying for this Asian man. Now, was the Asian man going to take the position and be the pope and we averted that through prayer? I have no idea. I'm still praying into that, which is why I haven't made this video so quickly because instantly you want to go, "I missed it. Forgive me." Out of the other four videos that I've made, every single one of them has been apologetic, telling you that I'm sorry for missing it and not wanting to lead the body of Christ wrong. But I know I saw what I saw. And that's the part that I struggle with, not out of pride, but out of accuracy. What did I see? What was it about the Asian man in a white outfit rising up and trying to cause revival in the Philippines and in all the islands for the Catholic Church like a pope? Does that happen in the days ahead? I don't know. All I know is that the Lord said, "Let your yeas be yeas, your yeses be yeses, and your nays, nays. Always have a backbone like a crowbar when you're speaking for me. Never back down. Always be strong and fear God, not man. Don't worry about what they say about you, regardless of how hard the word is or what you say. Don't bow down to it, Brandon. Stand strong in it because fear me, not them." And so, I've always tried to abide by that. Be bold as a lion. I've always tried to be as bold as I can be. Most people say, "Oh, Brandon, poor you." Oh folks, we all can miss it. That's not the problem. I don't mind missing it. I've missed it before, and I know I'll probably miss it again. But when you are leading hundreds of thousands of people in prayer and doing this, I pray for God to make me as accurate as possible. God, make me as accurate. I want this vessel to be, when I'm receiving a word from you, flowing through a vessel that doesn't have issues. Make me a vessel that has no issues. And that's only with spending time at his feet. This is something that I'm having to really weigh out because I know I saw it was so clear. Everything I saw about the calendar flip in front of my face, the storm, all of it, the root coming down, it was so clear. And I go, "Lord, what is this?" Like I said, I never want to make excuses. I'm not here to be popular. I don't care. Quite frankly, if it turns off tomorrow, I'll go doing what I always have done. I've done exactly what he's asked me to do. But I do not want to lead people astray. I want people to be able to come here and not go, "Well, can I trust the word? Is it flaky?" I don't want to be what it was in 2020. I always want to be transparent. And so that's why I've struggled with this because I even struggled with the Asian man. I'm just being real with you. It was weird for me. And I was like, "What is this?" So I always go back and pray over my mind and say, "Father, I thank you that no familiar voices, no false spirits or anything will mess with my visions or my dreams or anything, and that I'm always lined up with you." I think it's interesting, folks, because the bigger the platform, the greater the demonic attack has been that I never speak of because you don't give them any credit. But I always know that the enemy comes as an angel of light and he tries to come and snare people. So if he snared me—and this is all, please God, that's the part I have to say, please forgive me—all I can tell you is I try and this is very humbling. I never had any pride about it. I'm trying really hard right now, but the Lord showed me. And there's a lot of prophetic voices that are watchers that are seeing, and they think they can set in stone, and they are walking in a watcher's calling. And then there's a lot of watchers that are walking in the prophetic. And the Lord told me, He said, 'The reason there is confusion in the body of Christ is because it's not taught. There's not a lot of people—pastors, teachers, evangelists—teaching about the watchers and the prophets, the prophetic gifting and what it's about.' So, you automatically say, 'Brandon's a prophet.' And I've always told you, I've never had a word from anybody stating that Brandon Biggs is a prophet. Never have I ever once. And I've always said—they've always said, 'Brandon, you're called to pray.' Even the Lord said, 'Brandon, you're called to be an intercessor to the nations.' I said, 'What? That's cool.' But everybody says, 'Well, you're a prophet because you see in the future and you see all these things and it comes to pass.' I see sprigs of it, but I haven't seen the full something, you know, taking the baton of healing to the nations. But I just wanted to make this video. I was sitting here in the parking lot and it's not all with the background. I'm at Sprouts. I told Braden, I said, 'I've got to release this. Hey, I'm down—I think I'm down 15 pounds. It's pretty good. I'm trying. I've got to turn this around. I realize that weight can be a distraction. Clothes can be a distraction. And I don't want my weight to be a distraction to everybody. And I don't want my clothes to be a distraction. Watchers watch. What are you watching for? Watch and pray. For there are people who are watchers trying to be prophetic, and there are those who are prophetic trying to be watchers. Know your place and what I've called you to be. It's all in how you see. He says it's all in how you see; it's all in how you relay what I tell you to say. I see it for the first time ever. I see it, son. And that's why they link them so close together, because one is seeing to change things and one is seeing and decreeing things, and they flow together like harmony. The world confuses it. One thinks he's prophetic when he's a watcher, and the one that's a watcher thinks he's prophetic. They try to mix together and say, 'Well, I'm a watchman,' but they are two different assignments. Both are based out of prayer. Do you see? Every gift—from pastor, prophet, teacher, evangelist, and apostle—they all are based out of prayer. The foundation of every ministry gift is prayer, and the Word backs it. I've called intercessors; I've called people to be intercessors. Prayer changes things. He says, 'Averting what the enemy has in store for you.' You don't know what you've averted. You don't know what you've done by your prayer, my son. So look up. Have a heart that's looked up today, a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Look up today, for you don't know what you've averted. Oh, don't look down. Stand on what I say. They will laugh and they will mock because they're ignorant to that which is to come. And there's judgment for them. I said, 'Touch not mine anointed. Touch not my prophetic voices. Touch not them. Harm no man.' I will silence those critics. I will silence the critics I hear. Oh, pray for them, for many more critics will come. More critics will come as the unraveling and the revealing come stronger and stronger. As you come up higher and higher with the fire, your job is to avert these things. I say it's a prayer veil. Many prayer veils. Understanding your gift, understanding your place of authority, understanding what I've called you to do. It's so interesting; it's all about the teaching in the church. They don't teach about the spiritual gifts or how they flow. For a lot of people—the evangelists, the pastors—the meaning of what they're called to be is surface. Watchmen, pastors, prophets—they leave it there. It's a title, it's a label, but it doesn't go into the depth of what they do, and therefore it brings confusion in the Body of Christ. The Lord says time and time again, people get out of step and out of sync with Him, trying to operate on a platform that they are not anointed to operate in, and it brings confusion. They say, 'I'm a prophet.' He says they're not; they're watchers. They say, 'I'm a prophet,' and He says, 'No, they're not. They're called to pray.' They're seeing the future and they use the prophetic eye to change things. I see faces of big ministers right now. Kim Clement was a true prophet. Understanding your position of authority and what He's called you to be breaks the confusion. It's not confusing; it's understanding who you are and teaching it from the pulpit. I got something today; I saw things that brought clarity for me. I needed that. I appreciate You, Holy Spirit. It clears up confusion. Thank you, Father. You don't know what you've averted. You don't know what we've done. That's what He says, for He shows you that which is to come and how you change it as a watchman versus prophetic. So many people stepped out of step and out of sync. They are trying to be one thing when He's called them to be another, but they don't know who they are because they're not taught. They function very similarly. They both see through the eyes on the wall, but one sees so far and with more detail. They operate like a right eye and a left eye. Both are seeing, but one is called to pray and do something different. All giftings are based out of prayer, but one's assignment is prayer versus decreeing like a pillar. It's not taught, and even what I just saw is just a surface scratch of something much deeper. There is depth to this. I pray this video blessed you today; it blessed me.]
